common.providerNotConfigured: Add a provider API key to get started.
toolbar.subtitle: Translate and polish · one workspace
translate.label: Translate
translate.sourcePlaceholder: Type or paste text in Chinese or English — Lucid detects the direction…
translate.resultPlaceholder: The translation will stream in here. Lucid detects whether your text is Chinese or English and translates the other way automatically.
privacy.hosted: Your text is sent to {{provider}} to be processed.
privacy.local: Your text stays on this device — processed locally.
polish.label: Polish
polish.subtitle: refine a draft against its meaning & domain
polish.originalPlaceholder: The original sentence, in its source language…
polish.draftPlaceholder: The draft translation you want to refine…
polish.keywordsHint: tell the model which domain you're in
polish.resultPlaceholder: The polished sentence will stream in here — refined for fluency while preserving the original meaning and honoring your domain keywords. Switch to Compare to see what changed.
error.rateLimited: You've hit the rate limit — please wait a moment and try again.
error.providerDown: The provider is temporarily unavailable — try again or switch providers.
error.invalidKey: Your API key is missing or invalid.
error.timeout: The request timed out — please try again.
error.refusal: The model declined to respond to this request.
error.incomplete: The response was cut off before it finished.
error.validation: Please check your input and try again.
error.unknown: Something went wrong — please try again.
